name: celeste-platform
description: Céleste Events — Monorepo: Client + Admin + API

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:client" "npm run dev:admin"
scripts.build: npm run build:api && npm run build:client && npm run build:admin
scripts.install:all: cd client && npm install && cd ../admin && npm install && cd ../api && npm install
